task_description: Polish UI/UX for QuantNeon and QuantSync apps: replace mock data with API-wired hooks, add loading skeletons/error/empty states, spring-physics animations via framer-motion, staggered list entrances, page transitions, responsive 360px-1440px layouts, 44px tap targets, dark mode, and hover/press/focus states.

verification.summary: Both apps pass lint with 0 errors. Typecheck errors are all pre-existing (packages/observability OpenTelemetry mismatch, packages/server-core missing @quant/database build, and TS6305 missing dist files) - none from our changes. All source files in apps/quantneon/src and apps/quantsync/src compile without errors. Review fixes applied: nested buttons resolved in PostCard and page.tsx, dead columns prop removed from PostGrid, dark mode classes added to SpaceRoom.
